commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blocker is human maintainer/security-boundary acceptance plus contributor real behavior proof or an explicit proof override, not a narrow automated code repair.; Needs attention: The diff is intentionally narrow and avoids preserving OPENCLAW_ALLOW_ROOT, but it still makes two OpenClaw control env keys durable across service regeneration and needs maintainer security-boundary ac... commands.review_summary:
The PR exports the daemon service-env preservation helper, allowlists `OPENCLAW_CLI_CONTAINER_BYPASS` and `OPENCLAW_CONTAINER_HINT` across regenerated gateway service definitions, and adds focused tests that keep `OPENCLAW_ALLOW_ROOT` and arbitrary `OPENCLAW_*` keys stripped.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +44. Total +53 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: on current main, an existing service environment containing `OPENCLAW_CONTAINER_HINT` or `OPENCLAW_CLI_CONTAINER_BYPASS` reaches `collectPreservedExistingServiceEnvVars`, where every `OPENCLAW_*` key is skipped. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is human maintainer/security-boundary acceptance plus contributor real behavior proof or an explicit proof override, not a narrow automated code repair.
